name: genai/i18n
description: Localization for the GenAI stack — Spring-style message keys compiled from per-locale .ini catalogs into a reflection-free Cache\Messages, a Translator bean, a global __() view helper, and a LocaleInterceptor that resolves the request locale (?lang / session / Accept-Language). PHP 5.3-safe at runtime.

suggest.genai/attribute: PHP 8 build-time compilation of config/messages/*.ini into Cache\Messages.
suggest.genai/web: LocaleInterceptor (the Interceptor contract) for per-request locale resolution.
suggest.genai/session: Persisting the chosen locale across requests (used by LocaleInterceptor).
